one_time_description: Large income from investment in Nation partnerships and business entities (PFN 3 Feathers Development Limited Partnership) of $3,894,760 compared to $198,695 prior year
economic_notes: PFN 3 Feathers Development Limited Partnership (99% owned) and PFN 3 Feathers Development Corporation (100% owned) are government business enterprises accounted for using modified equity method. PFN 3 Feathers Development LP had total revenue of $4,394,177 and net income of $3,899,674 for year ended December 31, 2021. First Nation also has investment in 1247835 Real Estate Limited Partnership and PFN 3 Feathers Recycling Limited Partnership.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to exclusion of budgeted information from financial statements. Funds held in trust of $956,004 reported as financial asset. RBC Dominion Portfolio Investments include $4,845,000 held in trust for minor Band members subsequently contributed to Peters First Nation (2021) Minors Trust on June 27, 2022. Accounts payable jumped significantly from $575,513 to $6,767,808. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,488,255) + FNHC ($287,486) + FNESC ($42,649) + Province of BC ($1,880,793) = $3,699,183. Prior year revenue of $3,310,545 is notably low suggesting possible restatement or unusual year.
